summary: PR 2645 linked `melee/gr/grinishie2.c` by changing its object status from NonMatching to Matching in `configure.py` and adjusting GALE01 split/symbol metadata for the unit's data, sdata, sbss, and sdata2 ranges. Bot report evidence says this produced linked-code/data progress and two new matches for `main/melee/gr/grinishie2`: `.sbss` to 100% and `.data` to 100%. No PR body or human review comments were present.

key_files.role: Adjusted `melee/gr/grinishie2.c` `.data` split end from `0x803E4C78` to `0x803E4C72` while leaving text/sdata/sbss/sdata2 ranges shown in the hunk unchanged.

Updated grinishie2-related symbol metadata: added local labels/locals, narrowed some object sizes, changed several global string/float symbols to local `@NNN` symbols, and changed `grI2_804D6A00` size from `0x8` to `0x4`.

what_changed.text: `melee/gr/grinishie2.c` was marked Matching in the build configuration.
The `grinishie2.c` `.data` split end was reduced by 6 bytes, from `0x803E4C78` to `0x803E4C72`.

Several grinishie2 data symbols were re-scoped or resized: `grI2_803E4BF4` became local `@185`, `grI2_803E4C00` size changed from `0x78` to `0x34`, local strings `@207`, `@208`, and `@517` were added, sdata strings became local `@343` and `@344`, and sdata2 floats became local `@189`, `@190`, `@216`, and `@345`.
The bot report recorded two new matches for `main/melee/gr/grinishie2`: `.sbss` improved from 50.00% to 100.00%, and `.data` improved from 99.44% to 100.00%.

smart_moves.text: The PR linked the object only after adjusting split and symbol metadata for the affected unit, rather than changing source code in this slice.
Metadata changes used local labels and local `@NNN` symbols for data that the diff no longer kept as global `grI2_...` symbols.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For a link-only matching PR, object status changes may need coordinated updates to `configure.py`, `config/GALE01/splits.txt`, and `config/GALE01/symbols.txt`; the bot report can then confirm linked/matched section progress.
When section ownership is being finalized for a unit, symbol size/scope metadata and split endpoints may be part of the matching change, not just cosmetic cleanup.

naming_conventions.convention: This PR retained address-style global names such as `grI2_803E4A60`, `grI2_803E4AB4`, and `grI2_803E4C00` where globals remained, while converting some previous `grI2_...` string/float symbols to local `@NNN` names.
Local labels for data boundaries use forms like `...data.0`, and local object symbols in this diff use `@NNN` labels.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Link the unit by flipping its build object status from `NonMatching` to `Matching` once metadata changes bring reported sections to full match.
evidence_refs: text_corpus:decomp-dev[bot] report with `.sbss` and `.data` new matches

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use symbol metadata edits, including local scope conversion and object size correction, to align data section ownership before linking a matching object.

evidence_refs: text_corpus:empty PR body and one decomp-dev[bot] report
notes: Changed files and exact metadata edits are strongly evidenced by the loaded diff.
The PR body is empty and there are no human review comments, so reviewer intent and rationale are not evidenced.
The bot report provides progress numbers and section match claims, but no build log, objdiff details, or author explanation is included in the slice.
No source-code edits to `melee/gr/grinishie2.c` are present in this PR slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Link-only object promotion can be paired with split/symbol metadata fixes
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2645 linked `melee/gr/grinishie2.c` by changing `configure.py` from `Object(NonMatching, ...)` to `Object(Matching, ...)` while also correcting GALE01 split and symbol metadata. The bot report then recorded new `.data` and `.sbss` matches for `main/melee/gr/grinishie2`.

source_update_candidates.title: PR 2645 touched grinishie2 link metadata paths
source_update_candidates.text: `melee/gr/grinishie2.c` was linked through metadata/config changes in `configure.py`, `config/GALE01/splits.txt`, and `config/GALE01/symbols.txt`; no source file edit for `melee/gr/grinishie2.c` appears in this slice.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential curator-owned path fact for future searches around grinishie2 linking and metadata-only matching PRs.

source_update_candidates.title: Metadata corrections are legitimate matching work when linking a unit
source_update_candidates.text: Consider clarifying that split endpoints and symbol size/scope/local-label metadata can be part of a focused matching/link PR when backed by section ownership and report evidence, as in PR 2645.
source_update_candidates.reason: This aligns with the loaded data-section standards, but should remain a curator-reviewed standards wording candidate rather than an accepted new global rule.

rejection_notes: Do not infer why each individual symbol was renamed or resized beyond the diff evidence.
Do not claim human review approval details; the slice shows zero reviews and zero review comments.
Do not claim a full object/code match from objdiff details; the available evidence is the configure status change plus bot report, not a loaded objdiff log.
Do not generalize that all grI2 symbols should be local; this PR only changed the listed symbols.
